referenceUrls: Given by the quiz author (optional; use when provided)

requirements: Follow the given theme and reference URLs when writing answers/explanations; do not introduce contradictions.
Include the key words/terms that appear in the question statement inside the explanation text (not only in the prompt).
For multiple-choice and multi-select questions, provide explanations for every option word/phrase: define what it means and why it is correct/incorrect.
If there are related topics that help learning, give concrete examples (briefly) to connect the concept to adjacent topics.

expectedStructure: Why the correct answer is correct
Why each distractor/incorrect option is incorrect

toggles.label: 回答直後に解説を表示 / Show explanation immediately
toggles.behavior: When enabled, show the .explain block for questions that have been answered.

toggles.label: すべての回答を表示 / Show all answers
toggles.behavior: When enabled, show explanations for all questions and render/update the results table (answers + score) in the results panel.

resultsPanel.buttonBehavior: Clicking the button turns on 'Show all answers' and renders the results panel.

events.answerChange: Recomputes live score; updates reveal state; refreshes results panel if 'Show all answers' is enabled.
